title: Add first-class plan integration policy and task integration lifecycle to coordination types and MCP schema
summary: Extend live coordination policy and plan create/update surfaces with a real integration policy block supporting manual_pr, auto_pr, direct_integrate, and external, and add task-level integration lifecycle state so the runtime can distinguish branch publication, shared coordination publication, integration pending, integration in progress, integration failed, and integrated to target.

acceptance.label: Plans can persist and expose integration policy as first-class state rather than relying on design-doc-only intent.
Tasks can persist and expose integration lifecycle state distinctly from branch publication and ordinary completion.
